category_sources: Official docs describe Datasette as a tool for exploring and publishing data with an interactive website and API.
source_facts.description says open source multi-tool for exploring and publishing data.
display_name_sources: Official docs title and GitHub README use Datasette.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links comprehensive documentation at https://docs.datasette.io/.
Official docs contain Getting started, Installation, CLI reference, JSON API, and SQL query sections.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository https://github.com/simonw/datasette is linked from Datasette docs and README.
Repository README identifies datasette.io as the official project website and docs.datasette.io as comprehensive documentation.
tags_sources: Official docs and README say Datasette explores and publishes data as an interactive website and API.
